column9: Rule/Crosswalk/Comment

Rule:Cases not to be converted. Do not convert cases with a closing code of CDUP.
Do not convert closed cases that have been closed more than 5 years.
Do not convert cases with no DPs.
Do not convert cases with multiple payees UNLESS the balances for the 'old' payees are zero or not positive.
Do not convert cases with balances and no court order.
Do not convert Open cases with current support (CS or MS) and no active DP linked to the obligation.
Do not convert COLU cases.
Do not convert foster care cases where 1 or more DPs do not have a PID.
Rule:By moving the Legacy DACSES 4 byte status codes (OPEN, CLSD, or CTRM) to New DACSES 1 byte status code, truncation occurs. Hence, the values of O and C are moved.
Rule:If the case is responding (T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = R) and T1044.TYP_CD = FC or MAO or AFDC, default the case type to N
Case Closing Codes table lookup

Rule:If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = I or R and T1044.IVD_TYP_CD = DIRP or COLL, move N.
If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = I or R and T1044.status_code = CLSD  move N.
Else
If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = I and the NCP does not have a mailing address (T1051.ADD_TYP_CD = MAIL) with a correspondence fips code (CORR_FIPS_CD > 0) Move N.
If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = R and the CP does not have a mailing address (T1051.ADD_TYP_CD = MAIL) with a correspondence fips code (CORR_FIPS_CD > 0)Move N.
Else
If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = I or R, the member's address needs to be checked for out of country. 
If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = I and the NCP's T1051.ADD_TYP_CD = MAIL and T1051.STATE_ADR  = XX or spaces move C
If T1044.INIT_RESP_ST_CD = R and the CP's T1051.ADD_TYP_CD = MAIL and T1051.STATE_ADR  = XX or spaces move Y
If none of the above are true, the crosswalk rule is followed.

Rule:Where the case type has been converted as 'A' move S (DSS)
Where the case type has been converted as 'F' move D (DFS)
Where the case category has been converted as MO or PT move S.
If none of the above, move space.
Rule override by using default date
Rule override by using default date
Rule: First 2 bytes  move 10 (Delaware state FIPS code), next 3 bytes move T1044.county_cd, last 2 bytes move zeroes.
Rule: If the case type is AFDC or MAO and the good_cause_rsn_cd is not spaces or nulls, move A to GoodCause_CODE and use the non coop crosswalk to populate NonCoop_CODE.

Rule:This case level indicator uses B - where tax offset has been submitted for state and federal, I for federal only, and S for state only.
When reading T1038, the tax_int_sts_cd must be in ('URRS','SUBM') and the archive date must be high date (9999-12-31).
Move B WHEN ((T1038.NPA_ELIG_IND = 'Y' AND NPA_ARREARS_AMT > 0) OR (T1038.AFDC_ELIG_IND = 'Y' AND AFDC_ARREARS_AMT > 0)) AND (T1038.STX_LOT_ELIG_IND = 'Y' AND STAX_ARREARS_AMT > 0) 
Move  I  WHEN (T1038.NPA_ELIG_IND = 'Y' AND NPA_ARREARS_AMT > 0) OR (T1038.AFDC_ELIG_IND = 'Y' AND AFDC_ARREARS_AMT > 0)
Move S WHEN (T1038.STX_LOT_ELIG_IND = 'Y' AND STAX_ARREARS_AMT > 0) ELSE "N"

Rule:Where applicationfee_code: 
Has been set to  P  and  the  APPL_RETURN_DT  is a high date use what has been converted to VCASE.opened_date 
Has been set to space move low date

Rule: If the case type is AFDC or MAO and the unworkable reason code is UCNC  move P  to NonCoop_CODE.
If the case type is AFDC or MAO and the good_cause_rsn_cd is not spaces or nulls, move A to GoodCause_CODE and use the non coop crosswalk to populate NonCoop_CODE.
If the case type is AFDC or MAO and the above conditions are not met, move O to NonCoop_CODE.

Rule:If the NonCoop_CODE has been set to O, move the max  t1074.create_dt to populate VCASE.noncoop_date.
ELSE IF
T1044.good_cause_rsn_cd is populated, use the contents of the reason code along with T1044.case_num to fetch the T1074 and use the max  t1074.create_dt to populate VCASE.noncoop_date
Else
If T1044.UNWORK_RSN_CD = UCNC move UNWORK_RSN_EFF_DT.
Non Coop date
Conversion generated sequence number

Rule:Where the case type has been converted as 'A' or 'F'
or
Where the case category has been converted as MO or PT
move the case open date.
If none of the above, move low date.

Rule:The  T1044.typ_cd   and   T1044.unwork_rsn_cd  are used together to convert to some codes:
Where T1044.typ_cd =  AFDC   and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   %PFA   move   PA
Where T1044.typ_cd =  AFDC   and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   all others   move   FS
Where T1044.typ_cd =  COLL    and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   %PFA move   PC
Where T1044.typ_cd =  COLL    and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd NOT EQUAL  %PFA move   CO
Where T1044.typ_cd =  DIRP   move   DP
Where T1044.typ_cd =  FC or FCE   move   FS
Where T1044.typ_cd =  MAO  and T1044.status_cd = CTRM or CLSD and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   %PFA   move   PA else move FS
Where T1044.typ_cd =  MAO  and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   %PFA   move   MO
Where T1044.typ_cd =  MAO   and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   UPEI   move   PT 
Where T1044.typ_cd =   MAO  and none of the above MAO rules apply move MO
Where T1044.typ_cd =  NPA   and T1044.unwork_rsn_cd =   %PFA   move   PA else move FS
Where T1044.typ_cd =  SARR   move   FS

Rule:File ID for VFDEM File id where no fam_court_file
File id where no fam_court_file	Where  T1044.fam_court_file is blank, null, or all zeroes default the VCASE.file_id to the most recent T1061.file_num_txt  where T1061.file_num_txt is not equal to spaces.
Where  T1044.fam_court_file is blank, null, or all zeroes
and the most recent T1061.file_num_txt   is equal to spaces  AND a court order exists
default the VCASE.file_id to CONV followed by case_idno.
Where  T1044.fam_court_file is blank, null, or all zeroes and the above conditions are not met, move space.
Rule:If the ivd_typ_cd = NPA and the PREV_IVD_TYP_CD is spaces or nulls move P else move space
Rule:If case type is H (Non IV-D) move N else move F
VCASE enforcement status code table lookup
